test_description: Verify public and private subnet isolation and routing rules
business_risk: Security breach via public exposure of private resources
preconditions: VPC Terraform module applied; AWS credentials configured
test_steps: 1. Deploy ephemeral bastion host in public subnet; 2. Deploy test instance in private subnet; 3. Attempt SSH from internet to public host; 4. Attempt SSH from internet to private host; 5. Attempt SSH from public host to private host; 6. Check outbound internet access from private host via NAT Gateway
expected_result: Public host accessible; Private host inaccessible from internet; Private host accessible from bastion; Private host has outbound internet access
security_considerations: Ensure Security Groups allow testing traffic temporarily

test_description: Validate EKS Control Plane endpoint access restrictions
business_risk: Unauthorized access to Kubernetes API Server
test_steps: 1. Identify EKS Control Plane public/private endpoint settings; 2. Attempt `kubectl get nodes` from outside VPC (if public access disabled); 3. Attempt `kubectl get nodes` from within VPC; 4. Verify Security Group rules attached to Control Plane ENIs
expected_result: External access denied (403/Timeout); Internal access allowed; Security Groups strictly limit inbound port 443
success_criteria: API Server is not globally accessible

test_description: Verify pgvector extension functionality and IVFFlat indexing
preconditions: RDS instance running; Application user created
test_steps: 1. Connect to RDS; 2. Execute `CREATE EXTENSION vector;`; 3. Create table with vector column; 4. Insert dummy vector data (1536 dimensions); 5. Create IVFFlat index; 6. Perform K-Nearest Neighbor (KNN) search
expected_result: Extension enables; Index creation succeeds; Search returns semantically similar vectors

test_description: Verify Encryption at Rest and Node-to-Node Encryption
test_steps: 1. Inspect Domain Configuration via AWS API; 2. Check `EncryptionAtRestOptions` enabled status; 3. Check `NodeToNodeEncryptionOptions` enabled status; 4. Verify KMS Key ID validity
expected_result: Both encryption settings are 'Enabled'; KMS Key is 'Available'

feature_area: Auth Service - JWT Strategy & Cognito Integration
test_steps: 1. Generate valid JWT signed with correct private key; 2. Generate invalid JWT signed with wrong key; 3. Generate expired JWT; 4. Pass tokens to Passport strategy validate() method
expected_result: Valid token returns user object; Invalid/Expired tokens throw UnauthorizedException

test_description: Verify Role-Based Access Control enforcement on API endpoints
preconditions: Backend running; Test Users with 'Admin', 'Vendor', 'Client' roles created
test_steps: 1. Define endpoint with @Roles('Admin'); 2. Call endpoint as 'Admin'; 3. Call endpoint as 'Vendor'; 4. Call endpoint as 'Client'; 5. Call endpoint as unauthenticated user
expected_result: Admin: 200 OK; Vendor: 403 Forbidden; Client: 403 Forbidden; Unauth: 401 Unauthorized

test_description: End-to-End Login flow with MFA challenge
preconditions: User with MFA enabled exists in Cognito
test_steps: 1. Navigate to /login; 2. Enter valid credentials; 3. Verify transition to MFA screen; 4. Enter valid TOTP code; 5. Verify redirection to Dashboard
test_data_needs: Test User credentials, TOTP generator secret
security_considerations: Secure handling of TOTP in test

test_description: Validate PII Redaction Logic via Regex and Comprehend
test_steps: 1. Input text containing Email, Phone, SSN, Names; 2. Invoke redaction service; 3. Inspect output text
expected_result: All PII replaced with [REDACTED] or [ENTITY_TYPE]; Context preserved

test_description: Verify structured JSON extraction against Zod schema
business_risk: Data integrity issues in project setup
test_steps: 1. Send redacted SOW text to service; 2. Service calls LLM; 3. Validate response against Zod schema (Skills, Deliverables, Timeline); 4. Test with malformed LLM response
expected_result: Valid JSON returned matching schema; Malformed response triggers retry or error

test_description: Admin review and edit of AI-extracted data
test_steps: 1. Load SOW Review page; 2. Verify AI-populated fields; 3. Edit 'Skills' field; 4. Click 'Approve Brief'; 5. Verify status transition to 'Approved'
expected_result: Data saved correctly; Status updated; Vendor matching triggered

test_description: Verify ranking logic of vendor recommendations
preconditions: Vendors with skill embeddings populated; Project embedding generated
test_steps: 1. Execute matching query for Project A (Python, React); 2. Analyze returned list order; 3. Verify deactivated vendors are excluded
expected_result: Vendor with 'Python/React' ranked higher than 'Java/Angular'; Deactivated vendors absent

test_description: Verify Saga Rollback on Payment Gateway Failure
preconditions: Mock Stripe API configured to return error
test_steps: 1. Initiate Payout; 2. Saga Step 1: Update DB status to 'Processing' (Success); 3. Saga Step 2: Call Stripe API (Fail); 4. Verify Compensation Step: DB status reverted to 'Pending/Failed'
expected_result: System returns to consistent state; Error logged

test_description: Validate Webhook Signature Verification and Idempotency
preconditions: Stripe CLI or Mock sending webhooks
test_steps: 1. Send webhook with valid signature; 2. Send webhook with invalid signature; 3. Send same valid webhook twice
expected_result: Valid: 200 OK & Processed; Invalid: 400 Bad Request & Ignored; Duplicate: 200 OK & Processed Once

test_description: Admin Workflow: Generate and Send Invoice
test_steps: 1. Login as Admin; 2. Navigate to Project Financials; 3. Click 'Generate Invoice'; 4. Confirm Amount; 5. Verify Invoice status 'Sent'; 6. Verify Email dispatch trigger
expected_result: Invoice created in DB; Status update on UI; Email service invoked

test_description: Vendor submits proposal via secure link
test_steps: 1. Access portal via token URL; 2. Fill mandatory fields (Cost, Timeline); 3. Upload File; 4. Click Submit; 5. Verify Success Message; 6. Attempt access with same token again
expected_result: Submission saved; Confirmation shown; Second access blocked/shows 'Submitted' state

test_description: Verify Webhook Retry Logic on Failure
test_steps: 1. Trigger event (e.g., 'Proposal Submitted'); 2. Mock Endpoint returns 500; 3. Verify System queues retry; 4. Mock Endpoint returns 200 on 2nd attempt; 5. Verify Queue cleared
expected_result: Exponential backoff applied; Event eventually delivered

test_description: Verify immutability and completeness of audit logs
test_steps: 1. Perform critical action (e.g., Role Change); 2. Verify Log entry in OpenSearch; 3. Check fields: UserID, Timestamp, IP, Action, Before/After State; 4. Attempt to update/delete log entry via API (should fail)
expected_result: Log exists with all metadata; Modification denied

test_description: End-to-End PII Redaction with Real Document
test_steps: 1. Upload PDF containing known PII entities (Names, Addresses); 2. Service processes file; 3. Download 'Sanitized' output; 4. Text search for original PII
expected_result: Original PII text not found in output document
